{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MYXAUyDePogKHMrUqdPi88","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Product Requirements Document\n     2→\n     3→## Project Name\n     4→\n     5→Bookmate\n     6→\n     7→## Overview\n     8→\n     9→Bookmate is a web service that helps fiction readers find companions for reading and discussing books together. Users post listings for books they want to read, others join, and once a group forms, they connect via Telegram to coordinate their reading sessions. Think of it as matchmaking for book clubs.\n    10→\n    11→**Target audience:** English-speaking fiction readers who want structured reading companionship but struggle to find like-minded partners.\n    12→\n    13→## Goals\n    14→\n    15→- Make it effortless to find people who want to read the same book at the same pace\n    16→- Remove the friction of organizing a reading group — from discovery to first meeting\n    17→- Keep the platform lightweight: match readers, hand off to Telegram for discussion\n    18→\n    19→## P0 — Must Have (Core, launch blocker)\n    20→\n    21→### User Authentication\n    22→\n    23→Email + password registration and login. Required to post or join any listing.\n    24→\n    25→### Create a Reading Listing\n    26→\n    27→A user creates a listing with:\n    28→- **Book** — selected via Open Library API (title, author, cover art auto-populated)\n    29→- **Preferred language** — language for discussion\n    30→- **Reading pace** — e.g., \"1 chapter per week\", \"50 pages per day\"\n    31→- **Start date** — when the group begins reading\n    32→- **Meeting format** — voice calls, text chat, or mixed\n    33→- **Max group size** — author sets the cap (e.g., 3–6 people)\n    34→\n    35→### Browse Listings\n    36→\n    37→Simple chronological list of open listings. No search or filters at this stage — just a scrollable feed of available reading groups to join.\n    38→\n    39→### Join a Listing\n    40→\n    41→Any authenticated user can join an open listing. First-come-first-served, no approval step. A user can be part of multiple reading groups simultaneously.\n    42→\n    43→### Group Formation\n    44→\n    45→When a listing reaches its max group size:\n    46→- The listing becomes invisible to non-participants (effectively closed)\n    47→- The author is prompted to share a Telegram group link with participants\n    48→- The author manually creates the Telegram group and pastes the invite link\n    49→\n    50→### Notifications\n    51→\n    52→Email + in-app notifications for:\n    53→- **Each new sign-up** — listing author is notified when someone joins\n    54→- **Group full** — all participants are notified when the group reaches its cap\n    55→\n    56→### User Profile (Basic)\n    57→\n    58→- Display name\n    59→- Short bio\n    60→\n    61→## P1 — Should Have (Important, not launch blocker)\n    62→\n    63→### Search and Filters\n    64→\n    65→- Search listings by book title or author\n    66→- Filter by reading pace, start date, meeting format\n    67→- Browsable feed with sorting options\n    68→\n    69→### Telegram Group Creation Assistance\n    70→\n    71→Provide guidance or tooling to help the listing author create and share the Telegram group link more easily (e.g., step-by-step instructions, link validation).\n    72→\n    73→### Extended User Profile\n    74→\n    75→- Reading history (past groups participated in)\n    76→- \"Currently reading\" list\n    77→- Favorite genres\n    78→\n    79→## P2 — Nice to Have (Bonus, if time permits)\n    80→\n    81→### Automatic Telegram Group Creation\n    82→\n    83→System auto-creates a Telegram group via API and shares the invite link with all participants — no manual step needed.\n    84→\n    85→### Applicant Approval System\n    86→\n    87→Listing author can review and approve/reject users who want to join, instead of first-come-first-served.\n    88→\n    89→### Rating and Reputation System\n    90→\n    91→Users can rate their reading group experience. Build a reputation score based on participation history and peer ratings.\n    92→\n    93→### Discord Support\n    94→\n    95→Allow group creation via Discord as an alternative to Telegram.\n    96→\n    97→## Non-Goals\n    98→\n    99→- No payment or monetization features\n   100→- No mobile app (web only)\n   101→- No real-time chat within the platform (groups communicate via Telegram)\n   102→- No complex third-party integrations beyond Open Library API\n   103→- No AI-powered recommendations or matching (AI is allowed where it genuinely improves UX)\n   104→- No content hosting (e-books, PDFs, etc.)\n   105→\n   106→## Tech Stack\n   107→\n   108→- **Frontend + Backend:** Next.js (full-stack)\n   109→- **Database:** SQLite (local, persistent across container restarts)\n   110→- **Analytics:** SQLite-based (no third-party analytics)\n   111→- **Deployment:** Docker container with mounted volume for SQLite persistence\n   112→- **Book data:** Open Library API (free, no API key required)\n   113→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"34071e5a-ceb4-42c5-b6d5-43aec9dcbb12","timestamp":"2026-03-20T23:00:08.080Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/PRD.md","content":"# Product Requirements Document\n\n## Project Name\n\nBookmate\n\n## Overview\n\nBookmate is a web service that helps fiction readers find companions for reading and discussing books together. Users post listings for books they want to read, others join, and once a group forms, they connect via Telegram to coordinate their reading sessions. Think of it as matchmaking for book clubs.\n\n**Target audience:** English-speaking fiction readers who want structured reading companionship but struggle to find like-minded partners.\n\n## Goals\n\n- Make it effortless to find people who want to read the same book at the same pace\n- Remove the friction of organizing a reading group — from discovery to first meeting\n- Keep the platform lightweight: match readers, hand off to Telegram for discussion\n\n## P0 — Must Have (Core, launch blocker)\n\n### User Authentication\n\nEmail + password registration and login. Required to post or join any listing.\n\n### Create a Reading Listing\n\nA user creates a listing with:\n- **Book** — selected via Open Library API (title, author, cover art auto-populated)\n- **Preferred language** — language for discussion\n- **Reading pace** — e.g., \"1 chapter per week\", \"50 pages per day\"\n- **Start date** — when the group begins reading\n- **Meeting format** — voice calls, text chat, or mixed\n- **Max group size** — author sets the cap (e.g., 3–6 people)\n\n### Browse Listings\n\nSimple chronological list of open listings. No search or filters at this stage — just a scrollable feed of available reading groups to join.\n\n### Join a Listing\n\nAny authenticated user can join an open listing. First-come-first-served, no approval step. A user can be part of multiple reading groups simultaneously.\n\n### Group Formation\n\nWhen a listing reaches its max group size:\n- The listing becomes invisible to non-participants (effectively closed)\n- The author is prompted to share a Telegram group link with participants\n- The author manually creates the Telegram group and pastes the invite link\n\n### Notifications\n\nEmail + in-app notifications for:\n- **Each new sign-up** — listing author is notified when someone joins\n- **Group full** — all participants are notified when the group reaches its cap\n\n### User Profile (Basic)\n\n- Display name\n- Short bio\n\n## P1 — Should Have (Important, not launch blocker)\n\n### Search and Filters\n\n- Search listings by book title or author\n- Filter by reading pace, start date, meeting format\n- Browsable feed with sorting options\n\n### Telegram Group Creation Assistance\n\nProvide guidance or tooling to help the listing author create and share the Telegram group link more easily (e.g., step-by-step instructions, link validation).\n\n### Extended User Profile\n\n- Reading history (past groups participated in)\n- \"Currently reading\" list\n- Favorite genres\n\n## P2 — Nice to Have (Bonus, if time permits)\n\n### Automatic Telegram Group Creation\n\nSystem auto-creates a Telegram group via API and shares the invite link with all participants — no manual step needed.\n\n### Applicant Approval System\n\nListing author can review and approve/reject users who want to join, instead of first-come-first-served.\n\n### Rating and Reputation System\n\nUsers can rate their reading group experience. Build a reputation score based on participation history and peer ratings.\n\n### Discord Support\n\nAllow group creation via Discord as an alternative to Telegram.\n\n## Non-Goals\n\n- No payment or monetization features\n- No mobile app (web only)\n- No real-time chat within the platform (groups communicate via Telegram)\n- No complex third-party integrations beyond Open Library API\n- No AI-powered recommendations or matching (AI is allowed where it genuinely improves UX)\n- No content hosting (e-books, PDFs, etc.)\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- **Frontend + Backend:** Next.js (full-stack)\n- **Database:** SQLite (local, persistent across container restarts)\n- **Analytics:** SQLite-based (no third-party analytics)\n- **Deployment:** Docker container with mounted volume for SQLite persistence\n- **Book data:** Open Library API (free, no API key required)\n","numLines":113,"startLine":1,"totalLines":113}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01L7NnZxn3TrN5eJ6zpEqra5","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Learned Patterns\n     2→\n     3→## GitHub Authentication\n     4→- Always export GH_TOKEN from .env before running gh commands:\n     5→  ```bash\n     6→  export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2)\n     7→  ```\n     8→- Cannot `--add-reviewer` when token owner is the PR author (HTTP 422)\n     9→- Repo created under TommyBrennan (not XanderZhu — can't create for other users)\n    10→\n    11→## Session Flow\n    12→- First session bootstraps repo, creates issues from PRD as `approved` + `prd`\n    13→- PRD features are pre-approved — no proposal step needed\n    14→- Focus on housekeeping when blocked: organize project board, update memory\n    15→\n    16→## Environment\n    17→- Find agent-browser with: `which agent-browser`\n    18→- agent-browser requires `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp` prefix due to socket dir permissions\n    19→- Playwright chromium needs manual install: `npx playwright install chromium`\n    20→- Git remote uses PAT in URL: `https://ghp_...@github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate.git`\n    21→- Git remote URL may lose PAT between sessions — re-set with `git remote set-url`\n    22→- Must set `git config user.email` and `user.name` each session if not set globally\n    23→\n    24→## Build\n    25→- Next.js 16 Turbopack fails in this environment (can't read /root dir)\n    26→- Use Next.js 15 which defaults to webpack\n    27→- Build from app/ directory: `cd app && npx next build`\n    28→- `useRef<T>()` needs explicit `undefined` arg in React 19: `useRef<T>(undefined)`\n    29→- better-sqlite3 `.all()` returns `unknown[]` — cast explicitly for TS\n    30→\n    31→## Browser Testing\n    32→- agent-browser WORKS with: `export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"`\n    33→- Crashes after extended use (~5+ min) due to Chromium memory pressure\n    34→- Restart between recording scenes: `agent-browser close && rm -rf $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/agent-browser/ && sleep 2`\n    35→- For snapshot timeouts on pages with many elements (e.g., book search dropdown), use `agent-browser screenshot` or JS eval instead\n    36→- Book search results can't use `find text` (multiple matches) — use JS: `document.querySelector(\"button[type=button].w-full\").click()`\n    37→- Reading pace input ref (@e17) times out — use `agent-browser eval` with nativeInputValueSetter to set values\n    38→- For API testing: `curl -s URL | python3 -m json.tool`\n    39→- ffmpeg: static binary at ~/bin/ffmpeg — `export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"` needed each session\n    40→- When recording demos: login user BEFORE starting recording, then navigate to target page\n    41→\n    42→## Deployment\n    43→- No root/sudo access — can't apt-get install, create systemd services, or install nginx\n    44→- PM2 available via npx (not global): `npx pm2 start/stop/restart/list/logs`\n    45→- Deploy script: `./scripts/deploy.sh` (pull, install, build, restart PM2)\n    46→- Production runs on port 3000 directly (no reverse proxy)\n    47→- Public IP: 89.167.127.85 (IPv4), 2a01:4f9:c013:600f::1 (IPv6)\n    48→- Kill stale dev servers before deploy: check `ss -tlnp | grep 3000`\n    49→- PM2 ecosystem config at `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n    50→- PM2 logs at `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n    51→\n    52→## React + SQLite\n    53→- SQLite stores booleans as integers (0/1). In JSX, `{0 && <Component />}` renders \"0\" as text. Always use `!!value` or `Boolean(value)` for numeric fields in `&&` conditionals.\n    54→- Git `add` with bracket directories like `[id]` needs escaping or use from project root\n    55→\n    56→## Security\n    57→- Telegram webhook commands (/link, /link_ID) must verify the sender is the listing author via telegram_user_links table\n    58→- Always validate external URLs before storing (e.g., book_cover_url must start with https://covers.openlibrary.org/)\n    59→- Notification failures should never mask successful DB transactions — wrap in separate try/catch\n    60→- Move related DB writes inside the same transaction for atomicity (e.g., rejection of pending apps when group fills)\n    61→- Query string parameters from URL are always strings — parseInt() before DB queries on integer columns\n    62→\n    63→## Working Directory\n    64→- Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate\n    65→- App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app\n    66→- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n    67→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"7ecb01d9-3c95-4f8d-a25f-6a3ee07f0722","timestamp":"2026-03-20T23:00:08.381Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/patterns.md","content":"# Learned Patterns\n\n## GitHub Authentication\n- Always export GH_TOKEN from .env before running gh commands:\n  ```bash\n  export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2)\n  ```\n- Cannot `--add-reviewer` when token owner is the PR author (HTTP 422)\n- Repo created under TommyBrennan (not XanderZhu — can't create for other users)\n\n## Session Flow\n- First session bootstraps repo, creates issues from PRD as `approved` + `prd`\n- PRD features are pre-approved — no proposal step needed\n- Focus on housekeeping when blocked: organize project board, update memory\n\n## Environment\n- Find agent-browser with: `which agent-browser`\n- agent-browser requires `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp` prefix due to socket dir permissions\n- Playwright chromium needs manual install: `npx playwright install chromium`\n- Git remote uses PAT in URL: `https://ghp_...@github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate.git`\n- Git remote URL may lose PAT between sessions — re-set with `git remote set-url`\n- Must set `git config user.email` and `user.name` each session if not set globally\n\n## Build\n- Next.js 16 Turbopack fails in this environment (can't read /root dir)\n- Use Next.js 15 which defaults to webpack\n- Build from app/ directory: `cd app && npx next build`\n- `useRef<T>()` needs explicit `undefined` arg in React 19: `useRef<T>(undefined)`\n- better-sqlite3 `.all()` returns `unknown[]` — cast explicitly for TS\n\n## Browser Testing\n- agent-browser WORKS with: `export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"`\n- Crashes after extended use (~5+ min) due to Chromium memory pressure\n- Restart between recording scenes: `agent-browser close && rm -rf $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/agent-browser/ && sleep 2`\n- For snapshot timeouts on pages with many elements (e.g., book search dropdown), use `agent-browser screenshot` or JS eval instead\n- Book search results can't use `find text` (multiple matches) — use JS: `document.querySelector(\"button[type=button].w-full\").click()`\n- Reading pace input ref (@e17) times out — use `agent-browser eval` with nativeInputValueSetter to set values\n- For API testing: `curl -s URL | python3 -m json.tool`\n- ffmpeg: static binary at ~/bin/ffmpeg — `export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"` needed each session\n- When recording demos: login user BEFORE starting recording, then navigate to target page\n\n## Deployment\n- No root/sudo access — can't apt-get install, create systemd services, or install nginx\n- PM2 available via npx (not global): `npx pm2 start/stop/restart/list/logs`\n- Deploy script: `./scripts/deploy.sh` (pull, install, build, restart PM2)\n- Production runs on port 3000 directly (no reverse proxy)\n- Public IP: 89.167.127.85 (IPv4), 2a01:4f9:c013:600f::1 (IPv6)\n- Kill stale dev servers before deploy: check `ss -tlnp | grep 3000`\n- PM2 ecosystem config at `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- PM2 logs at `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n\n## React + SQLite\n- SQLite stores booleans as integers (0/1). In JSX, `{0 && <Component />}` renders \"0\" as text. Always use `!!value` or `Boolean(value)` for numeric fields in `&&` conditionals.\n- Git `add` with bracket directories like `[id]` needs escaping or use from project root\n\n## Security\n- Telegram webhook commands (/link, /link_ID) must verify the sender is the listing author via telegram_user_links table\n- Always validate external URLs before storing (e.g., book_cover_url must start with https://covers.openlibrary.org/)\n- Notification failures should never mask successful DB transactions — wrap in separate try/catch\n- Move related DB writes inside the same transaction for atomicity (e.g., rejection of pending apps when group fills)\n- Query string parameters from URL are always strings — parseInt() before DB queries on integer columns\n\n## Working Directory\n- Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate\n- App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app\n- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n","numLines":67,"startLine":1,"totalLines":67}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KrGCyiJ4W7US18TXp1GaDV","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Session 2026-03-20 22:00 UTC\n     2→\n     3→## What was found\n     4→- Production healthy: PM2 online (37min uptime, 0 restarts), HTTP 200, health endpoint OK\n     5→- All approved issues closed, no open PRs\n     6→- Open issues: #21 (needs-human: Telegram bot token)\n     7→- No new emails relevant to Bookmate\n     8→- PM2 error log: one stale \"Failed to find Server Action\" from previous deploy (non-critical)\n     9→\n    10→## What was decided and why\n    11→- With all approved work complete, ran a comprehensive code review to find security and robustness issues\n    12→- Found 7 actionable issues (1 critical, 6 important) — created issue #50 and fixed all in one PR\n    13→- Critical: Telegram webhook /link command could be hijacked by any Telegram user to link any listing to their group\n    14→\n    15→## What was done\n    16→1. Ran code review agent across all API routes, libs, and components\n    17→2. Created issue #50 (P0, approved, bug) for all findings\n    18→3. Implemented 7 fixes:\n    19→   - Telegram webhook: require verified account linking for /link commands\n    20→   - Added `telegram_user_links` table to DB schema\n    21→   - Added author self-application guard in apply route\n    22→   - Parsed listingId as integer in ratings GET handler\n    23→   - Added length caps on search/filter parameters\n    24→   - Moved pending-rejection loop inside DB transaction\n    25→   - Wrapped notification calls in try/catch (don't mask transaction success)\n    26→   - Validated book_cover_url origin (only covers.openlibrary.org)\n    27→4. Built, deployed, verified production health\n    28→5. Created PR #51, CI passed, merged to main\n    29→\n    30→## What was encountered\n    31→- No build errors or test failures\n    32→- Production restart was clean (no crashes, health check passed immediately)\n    33→\n    34→## What was learned\n    35→- Telegram webhook commands need user identity verification — can't trust any group member to be the listing author\n    36→- Notification failures should never mask successful DB operations — always separate concerns\n    37→\n    38→## Tools & skills used\n    39→- **Agent (code-reviewer)**: Full codebase security and quality review\n    40→- **Read/Edit**: Applied fixes to 7 files\n    41→- **Bash**: Build, deploy, PM2 restart, git operations, GitHub CLI\n    42→- **agent-browser**: Production screenshots during review phase\n    43→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"d0a58ae4-3988-437b-baad-fb5d396cce3d","timestamp":"2026-03-20T23:00:30.195Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/session-2026-03-20_22-00.md","content":"# Session 2026-03-20 22:00 UTC\n\n## What was found\n- Production healthy: PM2 online (37min uptime, 0 restarts), HTTP 200, health endpoint OK\n- All approved issues closed, no open PRs\n- Open issues: #21 (needs-human: Telegram bot token)\n- No new emails relevant to Bookmate\n- PM2 error log: one stale \"Failed to find Server Action\" from previous deploy (non-critical)\n\n## What was decided and why\n- With all approved work complete, ran a comprehensive code review to find security and robustness issues\n- Found 7 actionable issues (1 critical, 6 important) — created issue #50 and fixed all in one PR\n- Critical: Telegram webhook /link command could be hijacked by any Telegram user to link any listing to their group\n\n## What was done\n1. Ran code review agent across all API routes, libs, and components\n2. Created issue #50 (P0, approved, bug) for all findings\n3. Implemented 7 fixes:\n   - Telegram webhook: require verified account linking for /link commands\n   - Added `telegram_user_links` table to DB schema\n   - Added author self-application guard in apply route\n   - Parsed listingId as integer in ratings GET handler\n   - Added length caps on search/filter parameters\n   - Moved pending-rejection loop inside DB transaction\n   - Wrapped notification calls in try/catch (don't mask transaction success)\n   - Validated book_cover_url origin (only covers.openlibrary.org)\n4. Built, deployed, verified production health\n5. Created PR #51, CI passed, merged to main\n\n## What was encountered\n- No build errors or test failures\n- Production restart was clean (no crashes, health check passed immediately)\n\n## What was learned\n- Telegram webhook commands need user identity verification — can't trust any group member to be the listing author\n- Notification failures should never mask successful DB operations — always separate concerns\n\n## Tools & skills used\n- **Agent (code-reviewer)**: Full codebase security and quality review\n- **Read/Edit**: Applied fixes to 7 files\n- **Bash**: Build, deploy, PM2 restart, git operations, GitHub CLI\n- **agent-browser**: Production screenshots during review phase\n","numLines":43,"startLine":1,"totalLines":43}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01S3W4fB8uZosjVxFjLjweXu","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→@import \"tailwindcss\";\n     2→\n     3→:root {\n     4→  --color-bg: #faf7f2;\n     5→  --color-surface: #ffffff;\n     6→  --color-text: #1a1a1a;\n     7→  --color-text-secondary: #6b6b6b;\n     8→  --color-accent: #e07a3a;\n     9→  --color-accent-hover: #c96a2e;\n    10→  --color-border: #e5e0da;\n    11→  --color-success: #2d8a56;\n    12→  --color-error: #c0392b;\n    13→}\n    14→\n    15→body {\n    16→  background-color: var(--color-bg);\n    17→  color: var(--color-text);\n    18→  font-family: 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→h1, h2, h3, h4 {\n    22→  font-family: 'Georgia', serif;\n    23→  font-weight: 700;\n    24→  letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n    25→}\n    26→\n    27→input, select, textarea {\n    28→  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;\n    29→}\n    30→\n    31→.btn-primary {\n    32→  background-color: var(--color-accent);\n    33→  color: white;\n    34→  padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem;\n    35→  border-radius: 0.5rem;\n    36→  font-weight: 600;\n    37→  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;\n    38→  font-size: 0.9rem;\n    39→  transition: background-color 0.15s;\n    40→  cursor: pointer;\n    41→  border: none;\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→.btn-primary:hover {\n    45→  background-color: var(--color-accent-hover);\n    46→}\n    47→\n    48→.btn-primary:disabled {\n    49→  opacity: 0.5;\n    50→  cursor: not-allowed;\n    51→}\n    52→\n    53→.btn-secondary {\n    54→  background-color: transparent;\n    55→  color: var(--color-text);\n    56→  padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem;\n    57→  border-radius: 0.5rem;\n    58→  font-weight: 600;\n    59→  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;\n    60→  font-size: 0.9rem;\n    61→  border: 1.5px solid var(--color-border);\n    62→  transition: border-color 0.15s, background-color 0.15s;\n    63→  cursor: pointer;\n    64→}\n    65→\n    66→.btn-secondary:hover {\n    67→  border-color: var(--color-text-secondary);\n    68→  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02);\n    69→}\n    70→\n    71→.card {\n    72→  background-color: var(--color-surface);\n    73→  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);\n    74→  border-radius: 0.75rem;\n    75→  padding: 1.5rem;\n    76→}\n    77→\n    78→.input-field {\n    79→  width: 100%;\n    80→  padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem;\n    81→  border: 1.5px solid var(--color-border);\n    82→  border-radius: 0.5rem;\n    83→  font-size: 0.95rem;\n    84→  background: var(--color-surface);\n    85→  transition: border-color 0.15s;\n    86→}\n    87→\n    88→.input-field:focus {\n    89→  outline: none;\n    90→  border-color: var(--color-accent);\n    91→  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1);\n    92→}\n    93→\n    94→.badge {\n    95→  display: inline-flex;\n    96→  align-items: center;\n    97→  padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem;\n    98→ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n    74→                  aria-label={`User menu for ${user.displayName}${notifCount > 0 ? `, ${notifCount} unread notifications` : \"\"}`}\n {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EEhpJSJQB4FY28LWxauDsW","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Listing {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  book_title: string;\n     9→  book_author: string;\n    10→  book_cover_url: string;\n    11→  language: string;\n    12→  reading_pace: string;\n    13→  start_date: string;\n    14→  meeting_format: string;\n    15→  max_group_size: number;\n    16→  requires_approval: number;\n    17→  platform_preference: string;\n    18→  member_count: number;\n    19→  author_name: string;\n    20→  created_at: string;\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→export default function HomePage() {\n    24→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    26→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    27→\n    28→  // Search & filter state\n    29→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    30→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    34→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    35→\n    36→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    37→\n    38→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    39→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string) => {\n    40→      setLoading(true);\n    41→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    42→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    43→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    44→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    45→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    46→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    47→\n    48→      const qs = params.toString();\n    49→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n    50→        .then((r) => {\n    51→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    52→          return r.json();\n    53→        })\n    54→        .then((data) => {\n    55→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    56→          setError(null);\n    57→          setLoading(false);\n    58→        })\n    59→        .catch((err) => {\n    60→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    61→          setLoading(false);\n    62→        });\n    63→    },\n    64→    []\n    65→  );\n    66→\n    67→  // Initial fetch\n    68→  useEffect(() => {\n    69→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n    70→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    71→\n    72→  // Debounced search\n    73→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    74→    setSearchQuery(value);\n    75→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    76→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n    77→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    78→    }, 400);\n    79→  };\n    80→\n    81→  // Immediate filter changes\n    82→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    83→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    84→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    85→  };\n    86→\n    87→  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    88→    setReadingPace(value);\n    89→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom);\n    90→  };\n    91→\n    92→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    93→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    94→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value);\n    95→  };\n    96→\n    97→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    98→    setSort(value);\n    99→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n   100→  };\n   101→\n   102→  const clearFilters = () => {\n   103→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n   104→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n   105→    setReadingPace(\"\");\n   106→    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n   107→    setSort(\"newest\");\n   108→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n   109→  };\n   110→\n   111→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n   112→\n   113→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   114→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   115→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   116→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   117→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n   118→    };\n   119→    return labels[f] || f;\n   120→  };\n   121→\n   122→  return (\n   123→    <div>\n   124→      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n   125→        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   126→          Find your reading companion\n   127→        </h1>\n   128→        <p\n   129→          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   130→          style={{\n   131→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   132→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   133→          }}\n   134→        >\n   135→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   136→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   137→        </p>\n   138→      </div>\n   139→\n   140→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   141→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   142→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   143→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   144→            <input\n   145→              type=\"text\"\n   146→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   147→              value={searchQuery}\n   148→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   149→              className=\"input-field\"\n   150→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   151→            />\n   152→            <svg\n   153→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   154→              style={{\n   155→                position: \"absolute\",\n   156→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   157→                top: \"50%\",\n   158→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   159→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   160→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   161→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   162→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   163→              }}\n   164→              fill=\"none\"\n   165→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   166→              strokeWidth={2}\n   167→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   168→            >\n   169→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   170→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   171→            </svg>\n   172→          </div>\n   173→          <button\n   174→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   175→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   176→            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n   177→            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n   178→            style={{\n   179→              display: \"flex\",\n   180→              alignItems: \"center\",\n   181→              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n   182→              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   183→              position: \"relative\",\n   184→            }}\n   185→          >\n   186→            <svg\n   187→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   188→              width=\"16\"\n   189→              height=\"16\"\n   190→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   191→              fill=\"none\"\n   192→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   193→              strokeWidth={2}\n   194→            >\n   195→              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n   196→              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n   197→              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n   198→            </svg>\n   199→            Filters\n   200→            {hasActiveFilters && (\n   201→              <span\n   202→                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   203→                style={{\n   204→                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n   205→                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n   206→                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n   207→                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   208→                  position: \"absolute\",\n   209→                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n   210→                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n   211→                }}\n   212→              />\n   213→            )}\n   214→          </button>\n   215→        </div>\n   216→\n   217→        {/* Filter panel */}\n   218→        {filtersOpen && (\n   219→          <div\n   220→            id=\"filter-panel\"\n   221→            className=\"card mt-3\"\n   222→            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n   223→          >\n   224→            <div\n   225→              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n   226→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   227→            >\n   228→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   229→                <label\n   230→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   231→                  style={{\n   232→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   233→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   234→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   235→                  }}\n   236→                >\n   237→                  Meeting format\n   238→                </label>\n   239→                <select\n   240→                  value={meetingFormat}\n   241→                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n   242→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   243→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   244→                >\n   245→                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n   246→                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n   247→                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n   248→                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n   249→                </select>\n   250→              </div>\n   251→\n   252→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   253→                <label\n   254→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   255→                  style={{\n   256→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   257→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   258→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   259→                  }}\n   260→                >\n   261→                  Reading pace\n   262→                </label>\n   263→                <select\n   264→                  value={readingPace}\n   265→                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n   266→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   267→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   268→                >\n   269→                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n   270→                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n   271→                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n   272→                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n   273→                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n   274→                </select>\n   275→              </div>\n   276→\n   277→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   278→                <label\n   279→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   280→                  style={{\n   281→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   282→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   283→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   284→                  }}\n   285→                >\n   286→                  Starting from\n   287→                </label>\n   288→                <input\n   289→                  type=\"date\"\n   290→                  value={startDateFrom}\n   291→                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n   292→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   293→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   294→                />\n   295→              </div>\n   296→\n   297→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   298→                <label\n   299→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   300→                  style={{\n   301→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   302→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   303→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   304→                  }}\n   305→                >\n   306→                  Sort by\n   307→                </label>\n   308→                <select\n   309→                  value={sort}\n   310→                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n   311→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   312→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   313→                >\n   314→                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n   315→                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   316→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   317→                </select>\n   318→              </div>\n   319→\n   320→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   321→                <button\n   322→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   323→                  style={{\n   324→                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   325→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   326→                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   327→                    fontWeight: 600,\n   328→                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n   329→                    background: \"none\",\n   330→                    border: \"none\",\n   331→                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n   332→                  }}\n   333→                >\n   334→                  Clear all\n   335→                </button>\n   336→              )}\n   337→            </div>\n   338→          </div>\n   339→        )}\n   340→      </div>\n   341→\n   342→      {/* Results */}\n   343→      {loading ? (\n   344→        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   345→          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n   346→            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n   347→              <div\n   348→                className=\"skeleton\"\n   349→                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n   350→              />\n   351→              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   352→                <div\n   353→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n   354→                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n   355→                />\n   356→                <div\n   357→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n   358→                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n   359→                />\n   360→                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n   361→                  <div\n   362→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   363→                    style={{\n   364→                      width: \"5rem\",\n   365→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   366→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   367→                    }}\n   368→                  />\n   369→                  <div\n   370→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   371→                    style={{\n   372→                      width: \"4rem\",\n   373→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   374→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   375→                    }}\n   376→                  />\n   377→                  <div\n   378→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   379→                    style={{\n   380→                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n   381→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   382→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   383→                    }}\n   384→                  />\n   385→                </div>\n   386→              </div>\n   387→            </div>\n   388→          ))}\n   389→        </div>\n   390→      ) : error ? (\n   391→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   392→          <svg\n   393→            width=\"40\"\n   394→            height=\"40\"\n   395→            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   396→            fill=\"none\"\n   397→            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n   398→            strokeWidth={1.5}\n   399→            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n   400→          >\n   401→            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n   402→            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n   403→            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n   404→          </svg>\n   405→          <p\n   406→            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   407→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   408→          >\n   409→            {error}\n   410→          </p>\n   411→          <button\n   412→            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n   413→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n   414→            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n   415→          >\n   416→            Try again\n   417→          </button>\n   418→        </div>\n   419→      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n   420→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   421→          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n   422→            <>\n   423→              <p\n   424→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   425→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   426→              >\n   427→                No matching reading groups\n   428→              </p>\n   429→              <p\n   430→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   431→                style={{\n   432→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   433→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   434→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   435→                }}\n   436→              >\n   437→                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n   438→              </p>\n   439→              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n   440→                Clear filters\n   441→              </button>\n   442→            </>\n   443→          ) : (\n   444→            <>\n   445→              <p\n   446→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   447→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   448→              >\n   449→                No reading groups yet\n   450→              </p>\n   451→              <p\n   452→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   453→                style={{\n   454→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   455→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   456→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   457→                }}\n   458→              >\n   459→                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n   460→                companions.\n   461→              </p>\n   462→              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n   463→                Create the first listing\n   464→              </Link>\n   465→            </>\n   466→          )}\n   467→        </div>\n   468→      ) : (\n   469→        <>\n   470→          <p\n   471→            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n   472→            style={{\n   473→              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   474→              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   475→            }}\n   476→          >\n   477→            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n   478→            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n   479→          </p>\n   480→          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   481→            {listings.map((listing) => (\n   482→              <Link\n   483→                key={listing.id}\n   484→                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n   485→                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n   486→              >\n   487→                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n   488→                  <img\n   489→                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n   490→                    alt={listing.book_title}\n   491→                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n   492→                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   493→                  />\n   494→                ) : (\n   495→                  <div\n   496→                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n   497→                    style={{\n   498→                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n   499→                      flexShrink: 0,\n   500→                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   501→                    }}\n   502→                    aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   503→                  >\n   504→                    📖\n   505→                  </div>\n   506→                )}\n   507→\n   508→                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n   509→                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n   510→                    {listing.book_title}\n   511→                  </h3>\n   512→                  <p\n   513→                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n   514→                    style={{\n   515→                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   516→                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   517→                    }}\n   518→                  >\n   519→                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n   520→                  </p>\n   521→\n   522→                  <div\n   523→                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n   524→                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   525→                  >\n   526→                    <span\n   527→                      className=\"badge\"\n   528→                      style={{\n   529→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n   530→                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   531→                      }}\n   532→                    >\n   533→                      {listing.reading_pace}\n   534→                    </span>\n   535→                    <span\n   536→                      className=\"badge\"\n   537→                      style={{\n   538→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n   539→                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n   540→                      }}\n   541→                    >\n   542→                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n   543→                    </span>\n   544→                    <span\n   545→                      className=\"badge\"\n   546→                      style={{\n   547→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n   548→                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   549→                      }}\n   550→                    >\n   551→                      Starts{\" \"}\n   552→                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n   553→                        \"en-US\",\n   554→                        {\n   555→                          month: \"short\",\n   556→                          day: \"numeric\",\n   557→                        }\n   558→                      )}\n   559→                    </span>\n   560→                    <span\n   561→                      className=\"badge\"\n   562→                      style={{\n   563→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n   564→                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   565→                      }}\n   566→                    >\n   567→                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n   568→ (\n   570→                      <span\n   571→                        className=\"badge\"\n   572→                        style={{\n   573→                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n   574→                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   575→                        }}\n   576→                      >\n   577→                        Approval required\n   578→                      </span>\n   579→                    ) : null}\n   580→                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? 242, 0.08)\",\n   585→                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n   586→                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n   587→                          alignItems: \"center\",\n   588→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AWkgj2qQmdYPJphLkgWtiF","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import type { Metadata } from \"next\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import ListingDetail from \"./ListingDetail\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ListingRow {\n     6→  book_title: string;\n     7→  book_author: string;\n     8→  book_cover_url: string;\n     9→  reading_pace: string;\n    10→  author_name: string;\n    11→  max_group_size: number;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→export async function generateMetadata({\n    15→  params,\n    16→}: {\n    17→  params: Promise<{ id: string }>;\n    18→}): Promise<Metadata> {\n    19→  const { id } = await params;\n    20→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    21→\n    22→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    23→    return { title: \"Listing not found — Bookmate\" };\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const listing = db\n    27→    .prepare(\n    28→      `SELECT l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.reading_pace,\n    29→              l.max_group_size, u.display_name as author_name\n    30→       FROM listings l\n    31→       JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    32→       WHERE l.id = ?`\n    33→    )\n    34→    .get(listingId) as ListingRow | undefined;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing) {\n    37→    return { title: \"Listing not found — Bookmate\" };\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const title = `${listing.book_title} by ${listing.book_author} — Bookmate`;\n    41→  const description = `Join a reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}. Pace: ${listing.reading_pace}. Up to ${listing.max_group_size} readers. Posted by ${listing.author_name}.`;\n    42→\n    43→  return {\n    44→    title,\n    45→    description,\n    46→    openGraph: {\n    47→      title,\n    48→      description,\n    49→      type: \"article\",\n    50→      ...(listing.book_cover_url\n    51→        ? {\n    52→            images: [\n    53→              {\n    54→                url: listing.book_cover_url,\n    55→                alt: `Cover of ${listing.book_title}`,\n    56→              },\n    57→            ],\n    58→          }\n    59→        : {}),\n    60→    },\n    61→    twitter: {\n    62→      card: listing.book_cover_url ? \"summary_large_image\" : \"summary\",\n    63→      title,\n    64→      description,\n    65→      ...(listing.book_cover_url ? { images: [listing.book_cover_url] } : {}),\n    66→    },\n    67→  };\n    68→}\n    69→\n    70→export default function ListingPage() {\n    71→  return <ListingDetail />;\n    72→}\n    73→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QGzh2oNLVWKjiWwTMJThVS","session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"fa28f574-5f55-41c5-a5a5-a94169d171ba","timestamp":"2026-03-21T00:01:03.885Z"}

number;\n    39→  isMember: boolean;\n    40→  isAuthor: boolean;\n    41→  hasApplied: boolean;\n    42→  applicationStatus: string;\n    43→  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n    44→  currentUserId: number | null;\n    45→  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n    46→  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n    47→  platform_preference: string;\n    48→  discord_link: string;\n    49→}\n    50→\n    51→export default function ListingDetail() {\n    52→  const { id } = useParams();\n    53→  const router = useRouter();\n    54→  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n    55→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    56→  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n    57→  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n    58→  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    59→  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    60→  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n    61→  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    63→  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    64→  // Discord state\n    65→  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    66→  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n    67→  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n    68→  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    69→  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    70→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    71→\n    72→  // Rating state\n    73→  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n    74→  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n    75→  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n    76→  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    77→  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    78→\n    79→  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n    80→\n    81→  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n    82→\n    83→  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    84→    try {\n    85→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    86→      const data = await res.json();\n    87→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    88→        setListing(data.listing);\n    89→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    90→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    91→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    92→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    93→      } else {\n    94→        setFetchError(true);\n    95→      }\n    96→    } catch {\n    97→      setFetchError(true);\n    98→    } finally {\n    99→      setLoading(false);\n   100→    }\n   101→  };\n   102→\n   103→  useEffect(() => {\n   104→    fetchListing();\n   105→    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n   106→  }, [id]);\n   107→\n   108→  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n   109→    if (!id) return;\n   110→    try {\n   111→      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n   112→      const data = await res.json();\n   113→      if (data.givenRatings) {\n   114→        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n   115→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   116→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   117→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   118→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   119→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   120→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   121→        }\n   122→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   123→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   124→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   125→      }\n   126→    } catch {\n   127→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   128→    }\n   129→  }, [id]);\n   130→\n   131→  useEffect(() => {\n   132→    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n   133→      fetchRatings();\n   134→    }\n   135→  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n   136→\n   137→  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n   138→    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n   139→    if (!score) return;\n   140→    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n   141→    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n   142→    try {\n   143→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n   144→        method: \"POST\",\n   145→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   146→        body: JSON.stringify({\n   147→          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n   148→          ratedUserId: memberId,\n   149→          score,\n   150→          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n   151→        }),\n   152→      });\n   153→      const data = await res.json();\n   154→      if (!res.ok) {\n   155→        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n   156→      } else {\n   157→        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n   158→        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n   159→          ...prev,\n   160→          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n   161→        }));\n   162→      }\n   163→    } catch {\n   164→      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n   165→    } finally {\n   166→      setRatingSaving(null);\n   167→    }\n   168→  };\n   169→\n   170→  const handleJoin = async () => {\n   171→    setJoining(true);\n   172→    setError(\"\");\n   173→    try {\n   174→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   175→      const data = await res.json();\n   176→      if (!res.ok) {\n   177→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   178→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   179→          return;\n   180→        }\n   181→ Please try again.\");\n   187→    } finally {\n   188→      setJoining(false);\n   189→    }\n   190→  };\n   191→\n   192→  const handleApply = async () => {\n   193→    setApplying(true);\n   194→    setError(\"\");\n   195→    try {\n   196→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   197→      const data = await res.json();\n   198→      if (!res.ok) {\n   199→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   200→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QGzh2oNLVWKjiWwTMJThVS","session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"4cfcf573-1e49-4426-8526-3e36aad1732a","timestamp":"2026-03-21T00:01:24.225Z"}

71→        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-4\">\n    72→          <div>\n    73→            <label\n    74→              htmlFor=\"login-email\"\n    75→              className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n    76→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    77→            >\n    78→              Email\n    79→            </label>\n    80→            <input\n    81→              id=\"login-email\"\n    82→              type=\"email\"\n    83→              className=\"input-field\"\n    84→              value={email}\n    85→    72→        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-4\">\n    73→          <div>\n    74→            <label\n    75→              htmlFor=\"register-name\"\n    76→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017de12S4EBKwoEetZPjPM3n","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→\n     5→interface BookResult {\n     6→  key: string;\n     7→  title: string;\n     8→  author_name?: string[];\n     9→  cover_i?: number;\n    10→}\n    11→\n    12→interface Props {\n    13→  onSelect: (book: {\n    14→    title: string;\n    15→    author: string;\n    16→    coverUrl: string;\n    17→    olid: string;\n    18→  }) => void;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    22→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    23→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    24→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    25→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    27→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    28→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    29→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    30→\n    31→  useEffect(() => {\n    32→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    33→      if (\n    34→        containerRef.current &&\n    35→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    36→      ) {\n    37→        setOpen(false);\n    38→      }\n    39→    };\n    40→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    41→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    42→  }, []);\n    43→\n    44→  useEffect(() => {\n    45→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    46→      setResults([]);\n    47→      return;\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    51→\n    52→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    53→      setLoading(true);\n    54→      try {\n    55→        const res = await fetch(\n    56→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`\n    57→        );\n    58→        const data = await res.json();\n    59→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    60→        setOpen(true);\n    61→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n    62→      } catch {\n    63→        setResults([]);\n    64→      } finally {\n    65→        setLoading(false);\n    66→      }\n    67→    }, 400);\n    68→\n    69→    return () => {\n    70→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    71→    };\n    72→  }, [query]);\n    73→\n    74→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    75→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    76→    onSelect({\n    77→      title: book.title,\n    78→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    79→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    80→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    81→        : \"\",\n    82→      olid,\n    83→    });\n    84→    setQuery(book.title);\n    85→    setOpen(false);\n    86→    setActiveIndex(-1);\n    87→  };\n    88→\n    89→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    90→    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n    91→\n    92→    switch (e.key) {\n    93→      case \"ArrowDown\":\n    94→        e.preventDefault();\n    95→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n    96→        break;\n    97→      case \"ArrowUp\":\n    98→        e.preventDefault();\n    99→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n   100→        break;\n   101→      case \"Enter\":\n   102→        e.preventDefault();\n   103→        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n   104→          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n   105→        }\n   106→        break;\n   107→      case \"Escape\":\n   108→        setOpen(false);\n   109→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n   110→        break;\n   111→    }\n   112→  };\n   113→\n   114→  // Scroll active option into view\n   115→  useEffect(() => {\n   116→    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n   117→      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n   118→      if (activeEl) {\n   119→        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n   120→      }\n   121→    }\n   122→  }, [activeIndex]);\n   123→\n   124→  const activeDescendant =\n   125→    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n   126→      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n   127→      : undefined;\n   128→\n   129→  return (\n   130→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n   131→      <input\n   132→        type=\"text\"\n   133→        className=\"input-field\"\n   134→        value={query}\n   135→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n   136→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n   137→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n   138→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n   139→        role=\"combobox\"\n   140→        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n   141→        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n   142→        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   143→        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n   144→        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n   145→        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n   146→      />\n   147→      {loading && (\n   148→        <div\n   149→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n   150→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   151→          role=\"status\"\n   152→          aria-live=\"polite\"\n   153→        >\n   154→          Searching...\n   155→        </div>\n   156→      )}\n   157→\n   158→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   159→        <div\n   160→          ref={listboxRef}\n   161→          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   162→          role=\"listbox\"\n   163→          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n   164→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   165→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   166→        >\n   167→          {results.map((book, index) => (\n   168→            <button\n   169→              key={book.key}\n   170→              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n   171→              type=\"button\"\n   172→              role=\"option\"\n   173→              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n   174→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   175→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   176→              style={{\n   177→                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n   178→              }}\n   179→            >\n   180→              {book.cover_i ? (\n   181→                <img\n   182→                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n   183→                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n   184→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n   185→                />\n   186→              ) : (\n   187→                <div\n   188→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n   189→                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n   190→                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   191→                >\n   192→                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n   193→                </div>\n   194→              )}\n   195→              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n   196→                <div\n   197→                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n   198→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   199→                >\n   200→                  {book.title}\n   201→                </div>\n   202→                <div\n   203→                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n   204→                  style={{\n   205→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   206→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   207→                  }}\n   208→                >\n   209→                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n   210→                </div>\n   211→              </div>\n   212→            </button>\n   213→          ))}\n   214→        </div>\n   215→      )}\n   216→    </div>\n   217→  );\n   218→}\n   219→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QGzh2oNLVWKjiWwTMJThVS","session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"cd97c7a8-154b-4e3a-a830-c2bfc2dc04e1","timestamp":"2026-03-21T00:01:29.093Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MvLcU72DPmCxpUFYwfBUSR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Notification {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  listing_id: number;\n     9→  type: string;\n    10→  message: string;\n    11→  is_read: number;\n    12→  created_at: string;\n    13→  book_title: string;\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→export default function NotificationsPage() {\n    17→  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);\n    18→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    19→\n    20→  useEffect(() => {\n    21→    fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n    22→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    23→      .then((data) => {\n    24→        setNotifications(data.notifications || []);\n    25→        setLoading(false);\n    26→        // Mark all as read\n    27→        fetch(\"/api/notifications\", {\n    28→          method: \"PATCH\",\n    29→          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    30→          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n    31→        });\n    32→      });\n    33→  }, []);\n    34→\n    35→  if (loading) {\n    36→    return (\n    37→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n    38→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n    39→      </div>\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  return (\n    44→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    45→      <h1 className=\"text-3xl mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    46→\n    47→      {notifications.length === 0 ? (\n    48→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n    49→          <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n    50→            No notifications yet\n    51→          </p>\n    52→        </div>\n    53→      ) : (\n    54→        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n    55→          {notifications.map((n) => (\n    56→            <Link\n    57→              key={n.id}\n    58→              href={n.listing_id ? `/listings/${n.listing_id}` : \"#\"}\n    59→              className=\"card block hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow\"\n    60→              style={{\n    61→                borderLeftWidth: \"3px\",\n    62→                borderLeftColor: n.is_read\n    63→                  ? \"var(--color-border)\"\n    64→                  : \"var(--color-accent)\",\n    65→              }}\n    66→              aria-label={`${!n.is_read ? \"Unread: \" : \"\"}${n.message}`}\n    67→            >\n    68→              {!n.is_read && (\n    69→                <span className=\"sr-only\">Unread</span>\n    70→              )}\n    71→              <p\n    72→                className=\"text-sm\"\n    73→                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    74→              >\n    75→                {n.message}\n    76→              </p>\n    77→              <p\n    78→                className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n    79→                style={{\n    80→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n    81→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n    82→                }}\n    83→              >\n    84→                {new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n    85→                  month: \"short\",\n    86→                  day: \"numeric\",\n    87→                  hour: \"numeric\",\n    88→                  minute: \"2-digit\",\n    89→                })}\n    90→              </p>\n    91→            </Link>\n    92→          ))}\n    93→        </div>\n    94→      )}\n    95→    </div>\n    96→  );\n    97→}\n    98→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QGzh2oNLVWKjiWwTMJThVS","session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"0f8d8ad1-6fd7-47a9-9c02-fa0af5a7ad0b","timestamp":"2026-03-21T00:01:43.484Z"}
