Please try again.\");\n   209→    } finally {\n   210→      setApplying(false);\n   211→    }\n   212→  };\n   213→\n   214→  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n   215→    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n   216→    setError(\"\");\n   217→    try {\n   218→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n   219→        method: \"PATCH\",\n   220→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   221→        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n   222→      });\n   223→      const data = await res.json();\n   224→      if (!res.ok) {\n   225→        setError(data.error);\n   226→        return;\n   227→      }\n   228→      await fetchListing();\n   229→    } catch {\n   230→      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n   231→    } finally {\n   232→      setDecidingId(null);\n   233→    }\n   234→  };\n   235→\n   236→  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n   237→    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   238→  };\n   239→\n   240→  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n   241→    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n   242→    : \"\";\n   243→\n   244→  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n   245→    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n   246→    setTelegramSaving(true);\n   247→    setError(\"\");\n   248→    try {\n   249→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n   250→        method: \"POST\",\n   251→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   252→        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n   253→      });\n   254→      const data = await res.json();\n   255→      if (!res.ok) {\n   256→        setError(data.error);\n   257→        return;\n   258→      }\n   259→      await fetchListing();\n   260→    } catch {\n   261→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   262→    } finally {\n   263→      setTelegramSaving(false);\n   264→    }\n   265→  };\n   266→\n   267→  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n   268→    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n   269→    setError(\"\");\n   270→    try {\n   271→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n   272→      const data = await res.json();\n   273→      if (!res.ok) {\n   274→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n   275→        return;\n   276→      }\n   277→      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n   278→    } catch {\n   279→      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n   280→    } finally {\n   281→      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n   282→    }\n   283→  };\n   284→\n   285→  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n   286→    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   287→  };\n   288→\n   289→  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n   290→    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n   291→    : \"\";\n   292→\n   293→  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n   294→    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n   295→    setDiscordSaving(true);\n   296→    setError(\"\");\n   297→    try {\n   298→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n   299→        method: \"POST\",\n   300→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   301→        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n   302→      });\n   303→      const data = await res.json();\n   304→      if (!res.ok) {\n   305→        setError(data.error);\n   306→        return;\n   307→      }\n   308→      await fetchListing();\n   309→    } catch {\n   310→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   311→    } finally {\n   312→      setDiscordSaving(false);\n   313→    }\n   314→  };\n   315→\n   316→  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n   317→    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n   318→    setError(\"\");\n   319→    try {\n   320→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n   321→      const data = await res.json();\n   322→      if (!res.ok) {\n   323→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n   324→        return;\n   325→      }\n   326→      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n   327→    } catch {\n   328→      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n   329→    } finally {\n   330→      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n   331→    }\n   332→  };\n   333→\n   334→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   335→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   336→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   337→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   338→      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n   339→    };\n   340→    return labels[f] || f;\n   341→  };\n   342→\n   343→  if (loading) {\n   344→    return (\n   345→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n   346→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n   347→      </div>\n   348→    );\n   349→  }\n   350→\n   351→  if (fetchError) {\n   352→    return (\n   353→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   354→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Something went wrong</h2>\n   355→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   356→          Failed to load this listing. Please try again.\n   357→        </p>\n   358→        <button\n   359→          onClick={() => { setFetchError(false); setLoading(true); fetchListing(); }}\n   360→          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded cursor-pointer\"\n   361→          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   362→        >\n   363→          Retry\n   364→        </button>\n   365→      </div>\n   366→    );\n   367→  }\n   368→\n   369→  if (notAvailable) {\n   370→    return (\n   371→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   372→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">This listing is no longer available</h2>\n   373→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   374→          This reading group has reached its maximum size and is no longer visible to non-members.\n   375→        </p>\n   376→        <button\n   377→          onClick={() => router.push(\"/\")}\n   378→          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded\"\n   379→          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   380→        >\n   381→          Browse other listings\n   382→        </button>\n   383→      </div>\n   384→    );\n   385→  }\n   386→\n   387→  if (!listing) {\n   388→    return (\n   389→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   390→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n   391→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   392→          This reading group may have been removed.\n   393→        </p>\n   394→      </div>\n   395→    );\n   396→  }\n   397→\n   398→  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n   399→\n   400→  return (\n   401→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n   402→      {error && (\n   403→        <div\n   404→          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n   405→          style={{\n   406→            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n   407→            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n   408→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   409→          }}\n   410→        >\n   411→          {error}\n   412→        </div>\n   413→      )}\n   414→\n   415→      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n   416→        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n   417→          {listing.book_cover_url ? {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QGzh2oNLVWKjiWwTMJThVS","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive picture. Let me compile the report based on my findings:\n\n## Mobile Responsiveness Analysis Report - Bookmate App\n\nBased on my thorough exploration of the Bookmate codebase, I've identified several significant mobile responsiveness issues:\n\n### 1. **Globals.css - No Responsive Breakpoints**\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/globals.css`\n\nThe CSS file contains only static utility classes with no responsive variants:\n- Button padding is fixed: `padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem` (no responsive adjustments)\n- Card padding is fixed: `padding: 1.5rem` (too large for small screens)\n- Badge sizing is fixed: `padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem`\n- Error container padding is fixed: `padding: 4rem 1rem`\n\n### 2. **Navbar Component - Mobile Issues**\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Fixed width user menu:** Line 96 has `w-48` (192px fixed width) - this is 64% of viewport on a 300px phone\n- **No hamburger menu:** No mobile navigation - both the auth buttons and user menu rely on full viewport width\n- **Fixed navbar height:** `h-16` (64px) may be tight on very small screens\n- **No responsive button sizing:** \"New Listing\" button uses fixed padding at line 64\n- **No responsive gap:** Line 58 uses `gap-4` (16px) which doesn't adapt - could cause wrapping issues\n\n### 3. **Homepage (page.tsx) - Multiple Layout Issues**\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Fixed search layout:** Lines 142-215 use `flex gap-3` with no wrapping adjustments - the filter button and search box won't reflow properly on mobile\n- **Fixed minWidth on filter inputs:** Lines 228, 252, 277, 297 all use `minWidth: \"160px\"` - these will overflow mobile screens and not stack\n- **Grid-cols-2 at all breakpoints:** Line 463 in ListingDetail uses `grid grid-cols-2` with no responsive classes (should be `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2`)\n- **Fixed 16px gap:** Line 480 uses `grid gap-4` - no responsive adjustment for smaller screens\n- **Large heading sizes:** Line 125 uses `text-4xl` for heading - no responsive scaling\n\n### 4. **Listing Detail Component - Critical Issues**\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Horizontal flex layout breaks:** Line 416 `<div className=\"flex gap-5\">` with book cover (w-24 h-36) and content side-by-side - will overflow on mobile\n- **2-column grid at all sizes:** Line 463 `grid grid-cols-2` displays pace/starts/format/language in 2 columns even on phones\n- **Fixed book cover size:** `w-24 h-36` (96px x 144px) - not scalable for mobile\n- **No flex direction change:** Should be `flex-col md:flex-row` but uses `flex` at all breakpoints\n- **Fixed gap-5:** Line 416 - 20px gap doesn't adapt to small screens\n\n### 5. **Create Listing Page - Form Issues**\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Fixed max-width:** Line 80 `max-w-lg mx-auto` (512px) works, but doesn't adjust padding\n- **Fixed button layout:** Lines 215 and 286 use `flex gap-3` for radio buttons - 3 buttons in a row will have tiny width on mobile\n- **No responsive flex-direction:** Button groups should stack on mobile but don't have responsive classes\n\n### 6. **Auth Pages - Container Issues**\n**Files:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/auth/login/page.tsx` and `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/auth/register/page.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Fixed container:** Line 42/43 uses `max-w-md mx-auto mt-12` - fine width but `mt-12` (48px) at top is excessive on mobile\n- **Large heading:** Line 44/45 uses `text-2xl` - okay but no scaling\n- **Fixed form spacing:** `space-y-4` doesn't adapt to mobile viewports\n\n### 7. **Profile & Notifications Pages**\n**Files:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/profile/page.tsx` and `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/notifications/page.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Profile:** Line 205 uses `flex gap-1` for tabs - should probably be stacked on mobile\n- **Large grid layouts:** Don't use responsive classes for adapting to small screens\n- **Fixed card layouts:** No responsive adjustments for reading list cards\n\n### 8. **Layout Container**\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/layout.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Fixed max-width:** Line 36 `max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-8` has only 1rem padding - on 320px screens, that leaves only 288px for content\n- **No responsive padding:** `px-4` is only 16px - should be `px-2 sm:px-4` for better mobile spacing\n\n### 9. **No Responsive Image Sizing**\nMultiple components have fixed image dimensions:\n- Navbar avatar: `w-8 h-8` (line 79 Navbar)\n- Book covers: `w-16 h-24` (line 491 page.tsx), `w-24 h-36` (line 421 ListingDetail)\n- BookSearch: `w-8 h-12` (line 184 BookSearch)\n\n### 10. **Missing Responsive Typography**\nNo responsive text sizing found anywhere:\n- Headings don't scale (`text-2xl`, `text-3xl`, `text-4xl` all fixed)\n- No `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`, `xl:` prefixes in any component\n\n### Summary of Responsive Classes NOT Used\n- Zero instances of `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`, `xl:`, `2xl:` breakpoint prefixes\n- No `flex-col md:flex-row` pattern\n- No `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2` pattern\n- No responsive padding like `px-2 sm:px-4`\n- No responsive margins like `mt-4 md:mt-8`\n\n### Files with Identified Issues\n1. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/globals.css`\n2. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx`\n3. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx`\n4. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`\n5. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx`\n6. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/auth/login/page.tsx`\n7. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/auth/register/page.tsx`\n8. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/profile/page.tsx`\n9. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/notifications/page.tsx`\n10. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/layout.tsx`\n11. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx`\n\nThe app appears to be designed desktop-first with no mobile-first responsive design pattern implemented."},{"type":"text","text":"agentId: aebc59d37304491b5 (use SendMessage with to: 'aebc59d37304491b5' to continue this agent)\n<usage>total_tokens: 61535\ntool_uses: 25\nduration_ms: list cards\n\n### 8. **Layout Container**\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/layout.tsx`\n\nProblems identified:\n- **Fixed max-width:** Line 36 `max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-8` has only 1rem padding - on 320px screens, that leaves only 288px for content\n- **No responsive padding:** `px-4` is only 16px - should be `px-2 sm:px-4` for better mobile spacing\n\n### 9. **No Responsive Image Sizing**\nMultiple components have fixed image dimensions:\n- Navbar avatar: `w-8 h-8` (line 79 Navbar)\n- Book covers: `w-16 h-24` (line 491 page.tsx), `w-24 h-36` (line 421 ListingDetail)\n- BookSearch: `w-8 h-12` (line 184 BookSearch)\n\n### 10. **Missing Responsive Typography**\nNo responsive text sizing found anywhere:\n- Headings don't scale (`text-2xl`, `text-3xl`, `text-4xl` all fixed)\n- No `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`, `xl:` prefixes in any component\n\n### Summary of Responsive Classes NOT Used\n- Zero instances of `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`, `xl:`, `2xl:` breakpoint prefixes\n- No `flex-col md:flex-row` pattern\n- No `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2` pattern\n- No responsive padding like `px-2 sm:px-4`\n- No responsive margins like `mt-4 md:mt-8`\n\n### Files with Identified Issues\n1. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/globals.css`\n2. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx`\n3. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx`\n4. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`\n5. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx`\n6. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/auth/login/page.tsx`\n7. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/auth/register/page.tsx`\n8. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/profile/page.tsx`\n9. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/notifications/page.tsx`\n10. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/layout.tsx`\n11. `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx`\n\nThe app appears to be designed desktop-first with no mobile-first responsive design pattern implemented."}],"totalDurationMs":105643,"totalTokens":61535,"totalToolUseCount":25,"usage":{"input_tokens":6,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1409,"cache_read_input_tokens":58233,"output_tokens":1887,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1409},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01GqNxA7ZAVMkACroiVXCMi2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01NKw7e9dJSjMCG15JiHwE3y","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"Mobile responsiveness: add responsive breakpoints across all pages\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Problem\nThe entire Bookmate app uses desktop-only layouts with zero responsive breakpoints. No `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:` Tailwind prefixes exist anywhere in the codebase. This means:\n\n- Navbar buttons crowd together and potentially overflow on phones\n- 2-column grids don't collapse to single column on small screens\n- Fixed-width filter inputs overflow mobile viewports\n- Book cover + text flex layouts don't stack vertically on narrow screens\n- Typography doesn't scale for smaller screens\n- Container padding is too thin for mobile edges\n\n## Affected files\n1. `components/Navbar.tsx` — needs hamburger/mobile menu\n2. `app/page.tsx` — search bar, filters, listing cards need responsive layout\n3. `app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx` — book info grid, flex layout needs stacking\n4. `app/listings/create/page.tsx` — form layout, radio button groups\n5. `app/auth/login/page.tsx` + `register/page.tsx` — minor spacing adjustments\n6. `app/profile/page.tsx` — tab layout, reading cards\n7. `app/notifications/page.tsx` — notification cards\n8. `app/layout.tsx` — container padding\n9. `app/globals.css` — base responsive overrides\n\n## Acceptance criteria\n- All pages usable on 375px viewport (iPhone SE)\n- Navbar collapses to hamburger on mobile\n- Grids collapse to single column on small screens\n- Forms remain usable and don't overflow\n- Typography scales appropriately\nEOF\n)\" --label \"P1,approved\" 2>&1","description":"Create mobile responsiveness issue"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2295,"cache_read_input_tokens":48580,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2295},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"0f876be7-0bde-4afe-a487-63f343bce17b"}

client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface User {\n  id: number;\n  email: string;\n  displayName: string;\n}\n\nexport default function Navbar() {\n  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const router = useRouter();\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        if (data.user) {\n          setUser(data.user);\n          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n      });\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    setUser(null);\n    setMenuOpen(false);\n    router.push(\"/\");\n    router.refresh();\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <nav\n      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n      style={{\n        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n      }}\n    >\n      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <Link\n          href=\"/\"\n          className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n        >\n          bookmate\n        </Link>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n          {user ? (\n            <>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/listings/create\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                + New Listing\n              </Link>\n\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n                  aria-label={`User menu for ${user.displayName}${notifCount > 0 ? `, ${notifCount} unread notifications` : \"\"}`}\n                  aria-expanded={menuOpen}\n                  aria-haspopup=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                  </div>\n                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge text-white\"\n                      style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n                    >\n                      {notifCount}\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </button>\n\n                {menuOpen && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"absolute right-0 top-12 w-48 card shadow-lg py-2 px-0\"\n                    style={{ padding: 0 }}\n                    role=\"menu\"\n                    aria-label=\"User menu\"\n                  >\n                    <div\n                      className=\"px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold truncate\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {user.displayName}\n                    </div>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/profile\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Profile\n                    </Link>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/notifications\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Notifications\n                      {notifCount > 0 && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"ml-2 badge text-white\"\n                          style={{\n                            backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                            fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          {notifCount}\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </Link>\n                    <button\n                      onClick={handleLogout}\n                      className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer\"\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Sign out\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/login\"\n                className=\"btn-secondary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                Sign in\n              </Link>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/register\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n Match, group up, and discuss on Telegram.\",\n  openGraph: {\n    title: \"Bookmate — Find Your Reading Companion\",\n    description:\n      \"Find people who want to read the same book at the same pace. Match, group up, and discuss on Telegram.\",\n    type: \"website\",\n    siteName: \"Bookmate\",\n  },\n  twitter: {\n    card: \"summary\",\n    title: \"Bookmate — Find Your Reading Companion\",\n    description:\n      \"Find people who want to read the same book at the same pace. Match, group up, and discuss on Telegram.\",\n  },\n};\n\nexport default function RootLayout({\n  children,\n}: {\n  children: React.ReactNode;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <html lang=\"en\">\n      <body className=\"min-h-screen\">\n        <a href=\"#main-content\" className=\"skip-link\">\n          Skip to content\n        </a>\n        <Navbar />\n        <main id=\"main-content\" className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-8\">{children}</main>\n      </body>\n    </html>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":41,"startLine":1,"totalLines":41}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Q6VzSNUJvaB8V4WnwMF7NL","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Listing {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  book_title: string;\n     9→  book_author: string;\n    10→  book_cover_url: string;\n    11→  language: string;\n    12→  reading_pace: string;\n    13→  start_date: string;\n    14→  meeting_format: string;\n    15→  max_group_size: number;\n    16→  requires_approval: number;\n    17→  platform_preference: string;\n    18→  member_count: number;\n    19→  author_name: string;\n    20→  created_at: string;\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→export default function HomePage() {\n    24→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    26→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    27→\n    28→  // Search & filter state\n    29→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    30→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    34→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    35→\n    36→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    37→\n    38→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    39→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string) => {\n    40→      setLoading(true);\n    41→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    42→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    43→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    44→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    45→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    46→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    47→\n    48→      const qs = params.toString();\n    49→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n    50→        .then((r) => {\n    51→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    52→          return r.json();\n    53→        })\n    54→        .then((data) => {\n    55→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    56→          setError(null);\n    57→          setLoading(false);\n    58→        })\n    59→        .catch((err) => {\n    60→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    61→          setLoading(false);\n    62→        });\n    63→    },\n    64→    []\n    65→  );\n    66→\n    67→  // Initial fetch\n    68→  useEffect(() => {\n    69→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n    70→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    71→\n    72→  // Debounced search\n    73→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    74→    setSearchQuery(value);\n    75→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    76→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n    77→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    78→    }, 400);\n    79→  };\n    80→\n    81→  // Immediate filter changes\n    82→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    83→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    84→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    85→  };\n    86→\n    87→  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    88→    setReadingPace(value);\n    89→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom);\n    90→  };\n    91→\n    92→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    93→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    94→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value);\n    95→  };\n    96→\n    97→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    98→    setSort(value);\n    99→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n   100→  };\n   101→\n   102→  const clearFilters = () => {\n   103→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n   104→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n   105→    setReadingPace(\"\");\n   106→    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n   107→    setSort(\"newest\");\n   108→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n   109→  };\n   110→\n   111→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n   112→\n   113→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   114→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   115→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   116→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   117→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n   118→    };\n   119→    return labels[f] || f;\n   120→  };\n   121→\n   122→  return (\n   123→    <div>\n   124→      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n   125→        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   126→          Find your reading companion\n   127→        </h1>\n   128→        <p\n   129→          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   130→          style={{\n   131→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   132→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   133→          }}\n   134→        >\n   135→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   136→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   137→        </p>\n   138→      </div>\n   139→\n   140→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   141→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   142→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   143→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   144→            <input\n   145→              type=\"text\"\n   146→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   147→              value={searchQuery}\n   148→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   149→              className=\"input-field\"\n   150→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   151→            />\n   152→            <svg\n   153→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   154→              style={{\n   155→                position: \"absolute\",\n   156→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   157→                top: \"50%\",\n   158→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   159→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   160→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   161→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   162→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   163→              }}\n   164→              fill=\"none\"\n   165→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   166→              strokeWidth={2}\n   167→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   168→            >\n   169→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   170→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   171→            </svg>\n   172→          </div>\n   173→          <button\n   174→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   175→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   176→            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n   177→            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n   178→            style={{\n   179→              display: \"flex\",\n   180→              alignItems: \"center\",\n   181→              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n   182→              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   183→              position: \"relative\",\n   184→            }}\n   185→          >\n   186→            <svg\n   187→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   188→              width=\"16\"\n   189→              height=\"16\"\n   190→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   191→              fill=\"none\"\n   192→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   193→              strokeWidth={2}\n   194→            >\n   195→              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n   196→              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n   197→              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n   198→            </svg>\n   199→            Filters\n   200→            {hasActiveFilters && (\n   201→              <span\n   202→                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   203→                style={{\n   204→                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n   205→                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n   206→                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n   207→                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   208→                  position: \"absolute\",\n   209→                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n   210→                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n   211→                }}\n   212→              />\n   213→            )}\n   214→          </button>\n   215→        </div>\n   216→\n   217→        {/* Filter panel */}\n   218→        {filtersOpen && (\n   219→          <div\n   220→            id=\"filter-panel\"\n   221→            className=\"card mt-3\"\n   222→            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n   223→          >\n   224→            <div\n   225→              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n   226→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   227→            >\n   228→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   229→                <label\n   230→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   231→                  style={{\n   232→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   233→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   234→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   235→                  }}\n   236→                >\n   237→                  Meeting format\n   238→                </label>\n   239→                <select\n   240→                  value={meetingFormat}\n   241→                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n   242→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   243→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   244→                >\n   245→                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n   246→                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n   247→                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n   248→                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n   249→                </select>\n   250→              </div>\n   251→\n   252→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   253→                <label\n   254→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   255→                  style={{\n   256→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   257→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   258→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   259→                  }}\n   260→                >\n   261→                  Reading pace\n   262→                </label>\n   263→                <select\n   264→                  value={readingPace}\n   265→                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n   266→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   267→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   268→                >\n   269→                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n   270→                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n   271→                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n   272→                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n   273→                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n   274→                </select>\n   275→              </div>\n   276→\n   277→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   278→                <label\n   279→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   280→                  style={{\n   281→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   282→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   283→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   284→                  }}\n   285→                >\n   286→                  Starting from\n   287→                </label>\n   288→                <input\n   289→                  type=\"date\"\n   290→                  value={startDateFrom}\n   291→                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n   292→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   293→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   294→                />\n   295→              </div>\n   296→\n   297→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   298→                <label\n   299→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   300→                  style={{\n   301→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   302→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   303→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   304→                  }}\n   305→                >\n   306→                  Sort by\n   307→                </label>\n   308→                <select\n   309→                  value={sort}\n   310→                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n   311→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   312→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   313→                >\n   314→                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n   315→                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   316→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   317→                </select>\n   318→              </div>\n   319→\n   320→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   321→                <button\n   322→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   323→                  style={{\n   324→                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   325→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   326→                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   327→                    fontWeight: 600,\n   328→                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n   329→                    background: \"none\",\n   330→                    border: \"none\",\n   331→                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n   332→                  }}\n   333→                >\n   334→                  Clear all\n   335→                </button>\n   336→              )}\n   337→            </div>\n   338→          </div>\n   339→        )}\n   340→      </div>\n   341→\n   342→      {/* Results */}\n   343→      {loading ? (\n   344→        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   345→          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n   346→            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n   347→              <div\n   348→                className=\"skeleton\"\n   349→                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n   350→              />\n   351→              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   352→                <div\n   353→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n   354→                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n   355→                />\n   356→                <div\n   357→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n   358→                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n   359→                />\n   360→                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n   361→                  <div\n   362→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   363→                    style={{\n   364→                      width: \"5rem\",\n   365→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   366→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   367→                    }}\n   368→                  />\n   369→                  <div\n   370→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   371→                    style={{\n   372→                      width: \"4rem\",\n   373→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   374→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   375→                    }}\n   376→                  />\n   377→                  <div\n   378→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   379→                    style={{\n   380→                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n   381→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   382→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   383→                    }}\n   384→                  />\n   385→                </div>\n   386→              </div>\n   387→            </div>\n   388→          ))}\n   389→        </div>\n   390→      ) : error ? (\n   391→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   392→          <svg\n   393→            width=\"40\"\n   394→            height=\"40\"\n   395→            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   396→            fill=\"none\"\n   397→            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n   398→            strokeWidth={1.5}\n   399→            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n   400→          >\n   401→            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n   402→            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n   403→            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n   404→          </svg>\n   405→          <p\n   406→            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   407→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   408→          >\n   409→            {error}\n   410→          </p>\n   411→          <button\n   412→            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n   413→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n   414→            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n   415→          >\n   416→            Try again\n   417→          </button>\n   418→        </div>\n   419→      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n   420→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   421→          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n   422→            <>\n   423→              <p\n   424→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   425→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   426→              >\n   427→                No matching reading groups\n   428→              </p>\n   429→              <p\n   430→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   431→                style={{\n   432→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   433→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   434→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   435→                }}\n   436→              >\n   437→                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n   438→              </p>\n   439→              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n   440→                Clear filters\n   441→              </button>\n   442→            </>\n   443→          ) : (\n   444→            <>\n   445→              <p\n   446→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   447→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   448→              >\n   449→                No reading groups yet\n   450→              </p>\n   451→              <p\n   452→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   453→                style={{\n   454→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   455→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   456→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   457→                }}\n   458→              >\n   459→                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n   460→                companions.\n   461→              </p>\n   462→              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n   463→                Create the first listing\n   464→              </Link>\n   465→            </>\n   466→          )}\n   467→        </div>\n   468→      ) : (\n   469→        <>\n   470→          <p\n   471→            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n   472→            style={{\n   473→              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   474→              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   475→            }}\n   476→          >\n   477→            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n   478→            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n   479→          </p>\n   480→          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   481→            {listings.map((listing) => (\n   482→              <Link\n   483→                key={listing.id}\n   484→                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n   485→                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n   486→              >\n   487→                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n   488→                  <img\n   489→                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n   490→                    alt={listing.book_title}\n   491→                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n   492→                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   493→                  />\n   494→                ) : (\n   495→                  <div\n   496→             flexShrink: 0,\n   500→                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   501→                    }}\n   502→                    aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   503→                  >\n   504→                    📖\n   505→                  </div>\n   506→                )}\n   507→\n   508→                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n   509→                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n   510→                    {listing.book_title}\n   511→                  </h3>\n   512→                  <p\n   513→                    className=\"text-sm    <span\n   527→                      className=\"badge\"\n   528→                      style={{\n   529→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n   530→                   </span>\n   544→                    <span\n   545→                      className=\"badge\"\n   546→                      style={{\n   547→                        backgroundColor: fill=\"currentColor\">\n   592→                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 607→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"861e003e-77b0-45e2-8708-a0b1c8501e35","timestamp":"2026-03-21T00:04:02.465Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n              >\n                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n                  <img\n                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                    alt={listing.book_title}\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                  />\n                ) : (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                      flexShrink: 0,\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    }}\n                    aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                  >\n                    📖\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\n\nexport default function CreateListingPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n\n  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => {\n    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          bookTitle,\n          bookAuthor,\n          bookCoverUrl,\n          bookOlid,\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n          platformPreference,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-3xl mb-2\">Start a reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Choose a book, set your pace, and wait for readers to join.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Book\n          </label>\n          <BookSearch onSelect={handleBookSelect} />\n          {bookTitle && (\n            <div\n              className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg\"\n              style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\" }}\n            >\n              {bookCoverUrl && (\n                <img\n                  src={bookCoverUrl}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${bookTitle}`}\n                  className=\"w-10 h-14 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              )}\n              <div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {bookTitle}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  by {bookAuthor}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Meeting format\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={meetingFormat === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {[2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: var(--color-border)\",\n          }}\n          role=\"checkbox\"\n          aria-checked={requiresApproval}\n          aria-label=\"Require approval for new members\"\n          tabIndex={0}\n          onClick={() => setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval)}\n          onKeyDown={(e) => {\n            if (e.key === \" \" || e.key === \"Enter\") {\n              e.preventDefault();\n              setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval);\n            }\n          }}\n        >\n          <div\n            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"\n            style={{\n              flexShrink: 0,\n              backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                : \"transparent\",\n              border: requiresApproval\n                ? \"none\"\n                : \"2px solid var(--color-border)\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {requiresApproval && (\n              <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"white\">\n                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              Require approval for new members\n            </div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Members must be approved by you before joining the group.\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          type=\"submit\"\n          className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\n          disabled={loading || !bookTitle}\n
