successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"a408dcfa-9a0f-461b-aa1c-c67031e8bf85","timestamp":"2026-03-21T00:07:49.320Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"update","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useState, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface User {\n  id: number;\n  email: string;\n  displayName: string;\n}\n\nexport default function Navbar() {\n  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        if (data.user) {\n          setUser(data.user);\n          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n      });\n  }, []);\n\n  // Close menus on outside click\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n        setMenuOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Close mobile menu on route change\n  useEffect(() => {\n    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    setMenuOpen(false);\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    setUser(null);\n    setMenuOpen(false);\n    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    router.push(\"/\");\n    router.refresh();\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <nav\n      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n      style={{\n        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n      }}\n    >\n      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 h-14 sm:h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <Link\n          href=\"/\"\n          className=\"text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n          onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n        >\n          bookmate\n        </Link>\n\n        {/* Desktop nav */}\n        <div className=\"hidden sm:flex items-center gap-4\">\n          {user ? (\n            <>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/listings/create\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                + New Listing\n              </Link>\n\n              <div className=\"relative\" ref={menuRef}>\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n                  aria-label={`User menu for ${user.displayName}${notifCount > 0 ? `, ${notifCount} unread notifications` : \"\"}`}\n                  aria-expanded={menuOpen}\n                  aria-haspopup=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                  </div>\n                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge text-white\"\n                      style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n                    >\n                      {notifCount}\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </button>\n\n                {menuOpen && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"absolute right-0 top-12 w-48 card shadow-lg py-2 px-0\"\n                    style={{ padding: 0 }}\n                    role=\"menu\"\n                    aria-label=\"User menu\"\n                  >\n                    <div\n                      className=\"px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold truncate\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {user.displayName}\n                    </div>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/profile\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Profile\n                    </Link>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/notifications\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Notifications\n                      {notifCount > 0 && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"ml-2 badge text-white\"\n                          style={{\n                            backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                            fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          {notifCount}\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </Link>\n                    <button\n                      onClick={handleLogout}\n                      className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer\"\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Sign out\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/login\"\n                className=\"btn-secondary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                Sign in\n              </Link>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/register\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                Sign up\n              </Link>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Mobile hamburger */}\n        <div className=\"flex sm:hidden items-center gap-2\">\n          {user && notifCount > 0 && (\n            <Link\n              href=\"/notifications\"\n              className=\"badge text-white\"\n              style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n            >\n              {notifCount}\n            </Link>\n          )}\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}\n            className=\"p-2 cursor-pointer\"\n            aria-label={mobileMenuOpen ? \"Close menu\" : \"Open menu\"}\n            aria-expanded={mobileMenuOpen}\n            style={{ background: \"none\", border: \"none\" }}\n          >\n            {mobileMenuOpen ? \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface User {\n  id: number;\n  email: string;\n  displayName: string;\n}\n\nexport default function Navbar() {\n  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const router = useRouter();\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        if (data.user) {\n          setUser(data.user);\n          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n      });\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    setUser(null);\n    setMenuOpen(false);\n    router.push(\"/\");\n    router.refresh();\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <nav\n      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n      style={{\n        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n      }}\n    >\n      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <Link\n          href=\"/\"\n          className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n        >\n          bookmate\n        </Link>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n          {user ? (\n            <>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/listings/create\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                + New Listing\n              </Link>\n\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n                  aria-label={`User menu for ${user.displayName}${notifCount > 0 ? `, ${notifCount} unread notifications` : \"\"}`}\n                  aria-expanded={menuOpen}\n                  aria-haspopup=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                  </div>\n                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge text-white\"\n                      style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n                    >\n                      {notifCount}\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </button>\n\n                {menuOpen && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"absolute right-0 top-12 w-48 card shadow-lg py-2 px-0\"\n                    style={{ padding: 0 }}\n                    role=\"menu\"\n                    aria-label=\"User menu\"\n                  >\n                    <div\n                      className=\"px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold truncate\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {user.displayName}\n                    </div>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/profile\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Profile\n                    </Link>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/notifications\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Notifications\n                      {notifCount > 0 && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"ml-2 badge text-white\"\n                          style={{\n                            backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                            fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          {notifCount}\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </Link>\n                    <button\n                      onClick={handleLogout}\n                      className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer\"\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Sign out\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/login\"\n                className=\"btn-secondary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                Sign in\n              </Link>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/register\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                Sign up\n              </Link>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </nav>\n  );\n}\n"}}

     <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"","newString":"      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n              >\n                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n                  <img\n                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                    alt={listing.book_title}\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                  />\n                ) : (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                      flexShrink: 0,\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    }}\n                    aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                  >\n                    📖\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.25rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"10\" height=\"10\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? (\n                  <img\n                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                    alt={listing.book_title}\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                  />\n                ) : (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n              }}\n                    aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                  >\n                    📖\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GXbLVJWRWFfRJfcZzezyAU","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx has been updated. All occurrences were successfully replaced."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"21905dcd-4fbd-4d5d-b28e-fb8df7a8c73c","timestamp":"2026-03-21T00:08:08.901Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx","oldString":"              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>","newString":"              <div>","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom);\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\");\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n              >\n                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n                  <img\n                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                    alt={listing.book_title}\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                  />\n                ) : (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                      flexShrink: 0,\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    }}\n                    aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                  >\n                    📖\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.25rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"10\" height=\"10\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913
