{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01SpAT8pbY3qputHznN2hCHk","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01PvDaCWVkAkGBCmbFPvBtR8","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/session-2026-03-20_23-00.md","content":"# Session 2026-03-20 23:00 UTC\n\n## What was found\n- Production healthy: PM2 online, HTTP 200, health endpoint OK, 4 users, 7 listings\n- All approved issues closed, no open PRs\n- Open issues: #21 (needs-human: Telegram bot token)\n- No new relevant emails (only GitHub CI notifications and unrelated project assignments)\n- PM2 error logs: stale \"Failed to find Server Action\" errors from previous deploys (non-critical)\n- CI: all recent runs passing on main\n- Code review of entire app revealed zero responsive CSS breakpoints — no sm:/md:/lg: prefixes anywhere\n\n## What was decided and why\n- With all features implemented and recent sessions doing security fixes, identified mobile responsiveness as the biggest remaining gap\n- The app had zero responsive design — every page was desktop-only\n- Created issue #52 and implemented responsive fixes across 9 files\n\n## What was done\n1. Ran production health check (API + browser screenshots)\n2. Used Explore agent to audit all components for responsive CSS — found zero breakpoints\n3. Created issue #52 (P1, approved) for mobile responsiveness\n4. Implemented responsive design across all pages:\n   - **Navbar**: Added mobile hamburger menu with slide-down panel, hidden at sm+ breakpoint\n   - **Layout**: Responsive container padding (px-3 sm:px-4, py-4 sm:py-8)\n   - **Homepage**: Responsive heading (text-2xl sm:text-4xl), filter grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4)\n   - **Listing detail**: flex-col sm:flex-row for book cover layout, responsive cover sizing\n   - **Create listing**: Responsive heading and spacing\n   - **Auth pages**: Reduced top margin on mobile (mt-4 sm:mt-12)\n   - **Profile**: Scrollable tabs on mobile, responsive reputation layout\n   - **Notifications**: Responsive heading\n5. Built, deployed, verified production health\n6. Created PR #53, CI passed, merged to main\n\n## What was encountered\n- agent-browser crashed from Chromium memory pressure after ~3 minutes of use — known issue\n- Could not test mobile viewport directly in browser (Playwright headless doesn't support window.resizeTo)\n- Build and deploy went smoothly with no errors\n\n## What was learned\n- The entire codebase had zero responsive design before this session — worth checking early in projects\n- Tailwind v4 with `@import \"tailwindcss\"` includes all responsive utilities by default\n\n## Tools & skills used\n- **Agent (Explore)**: Comprehensive CSS responsiveness audit\n- **Read/Edit/Write**: Applied responsive changes to 9 files\n- **Bash**: Build, deploy, PM2 restart, git operations, GitHub CLI\n- **agent-browser**: Production screenshots (crashed during extended use)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":157,"cache_read_input_tokens":97678,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":157},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"62b880cb-9b6f-476c-a8c6-5cb8e520bfbc"}

Created issue #52 (P1, approved) for mobile responsiveness\n4. Implemented responsive design across all pages:\n   - **Navbar**: Added mobile hamburger menu with slide-down panel, hidden at sm+ breakpoint\n   - **Layout**: Responsive container padding (px-3 sm:px-4, py-4 sm:py-8)\n   - **Homepage**: Responsive heading (text-2xl sm:text-4xl), filter grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4)\n   - **Listing detail**: flex-col sm:flex-row for book cover layout, responsive cover sizing\n   - **Create listing**: Responsive heading and spacing\n   - **Auth pages**: Reduced top margin on mobile (mt-4 sm:mt-12)\n   - **Profile**: Scrollable tabs on mobile, responsive reputation layout\n   - **Notifications**: Responsive heading\n5. Here's a summary of what was accomplished:\n\n## Session Summary (2026-03-20 23:00 UTC)\n\n**Production Status:** Healthy (PM2 online, DB connected, 4 users, 7 listings)\n\n**Work Done:**\n- **Identified** that the entire app had **zero mobile responsive design** — no `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:` Tailwind breakpoints anywhere\n- **Created** issue [#52](https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate/issues/52) for mobile responsiveness\n- **Implemented** responsive design across 9 files:\n  - **Navbar**: Mobile hamburger menu with slide-down panel\n  - **All pages**: Responsive typography, spacing, grids, and flex layouts\n  - **Filter panel**: Responsive grid instead of fixed-width inputs\n  - **Listing detail**: Stacks vertically on mobile\n  - **Profile tabs**: Scrollable on narrow screens\n- **PR [#53](https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate/pull/53)**: CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production\n- Production verified healthy after deploy"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":433,"cache_read_input_tokens":98994,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":433},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4ba3897e-18da-4b68-9f3f-2f0f64397d1c","uuid":"f1b2b4ed-04f6-4073-85e1-b71ee5391331"}
